text:
Rebuild of EVANGELION: 3.0 (-46h) is a video released on khara inc.'s YouTube Channel on 29 April 2023 https://youtu.be/F7dSco6VERw . The video shows the evolution of the process of the EVANGELION: 3.0 (-46h) video with a few step-by-step looks and comparisons between the animatics and the final product.

Trivia

Officially, this is the only use of the term Rebuild of Evangelion since the announcement of the film series project back in 2006, when Evangelion: New Theatrical Edition had the name REBUILD OF EVANGELION（Working Title). The term Rebuild of EVANGELION would still be used in the making-of bonus features of 1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 3.0 + 1.11, and 3.0 (-46h).
